shortDescription: IRCC Super Visa · Parents/grandparents · 5-year stays · Insurance required

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Super Visa fee (CAD $100) and minimum medical insurance requirements ($100,000 coverage, 1 year) on canada.ca.

alert.title: Insurance is mandatory
alert.body: Super Visa requires valid Canadian medical insurance for at least 1 year, minimum $100,000 coverage. Without compliant insurance, application will fail.

about.label: Description
about.value: Multi-entry visa allowing parents and grandparents of Canadian citizens/PRs to visit for up to 5 years per entry without renewing status.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Parent/grandparent of Canadian citizen or PR · Child/grandchild meets LICO income threshold · Medical exam · Canadian medical insurance · Ties to home country

about.label: Insurance requirement
about.value: Private medical insurance from Canadian company valid minimum 1 year from entry, $100,000 minimum coverage.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Multi-entry visa; maintain valid insurance on each visit; respect super visa conditions.

eligibility.criterion: Child/grandchild is Canadian citizen or PR

redFlagsBanner: If refused, address medical, insurance, or LICO deficiencies before reapplication.

redFlags.title: Insurance non-compliant
redFlags.description: Coverage below $100,000 or not from Canadian insurer.
redFlags.fix: Purchase IRCC-compliant Super Visa insurance before apply

redFlags.title: LICO income not met
redFlags.description: Sponsor income below minimum for family size.
redFlags.fix: Verify LICO table; combine spouse income if applicable

redFlags.title: Medical inadmissibility
redFlags.fix: Complete exam early; address health issues with counsel

redFlags.title: Weak home ties
redFlags.description: Parent has no property/family remaining in India.
redFlags.fix: Document assets, spouse, and reasons to return

redFlags.title: Incomplete NOA documents
redFlags.description: Missing 3 years Notice of Assessment for sponsor.
redFlags.fix: Collect full 3-year NOA from CRA for sponsor

redFlags.title: Wrong relationship proof
redFlags.fix: Correct birth certificates linking applicant to sponsor

faqs.q: Can we guarantee Super Visa approval?
faqs.a: No. IRCC assesses medical, insurance, LICO, and ties. Never promise approval.
Verify current LICO table on canada.ca for family size including sponsoring household.
Must be Canadian company offering Super Visa compliant coverage—verify with insurer.
Super Visa allows up to 5-year stays per entry; higher LICO and insurance requirements.
Yes; assess combined documentation and sponsor income for family size.
Before application; use IRCC panel physician.
Often 3–8 months—check current IRCC processing times.
No. Visit and family time only—not employment.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Verify LICO with 3-year NOA before fees
Purchase compliant insurance from known Canadian provider
Link parent to sponsor with clear birth certificates
Document India ties even for elderly parents
postApproval: Remind to maintain valid insurance on each visit

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Insurance must be prepaid for 1 year—monthly pay plans often rejected for Super Visa.

quiz.question: Super Visa allows stays up to:

donts: Do not apply if LICO not met
Do not quote outdated LICO amounts
mistakes: LICO calculated wrong for family size

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample Super Visa insurance policy (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 1-year minimum coverage from Canadian insurer — explain to parents.

sampleDocs.title: Sample invitation letter from child (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Canadian child PR/citizen invitation with household details.

sampleDocs.title: Sample child income proof (mock)
sampleDocs.description: NOA or employment letter showing LICO threshold met.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.
